info.title: Blizzard Battle.net API
info.description: The Blizzard Battle.net API provides access to game data and user profiles for World of Warcraft, Diablo III, StarCraft II, and Hearthstone. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow.

tags.name: WoW Game Data
tags.description: World of Warcraft game data APIs

tags.name: WoW Profile
tags.description: World of Warcraft character profile APIs
